---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with KattoUI
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- KattoUI version or commit: [e.g. `main@abc1234`]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 126, Safari 17]
- Node.js: [e.g. 22.x]
- pnpm: [e.g. 9.x]
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Deployment target: [e.g. Cloudflare Workers, local dev]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here, including error messages, logs, or recent changes.
